popularStory.headline: Britain's Royal Families: The Complete Genealogy By Alison Weir pages 178-180   MALCOLM II to MALDRED son of MALDRED
popularStory.description:
Malcom II
Father: Kenneth II
Mother: Princess of Leinster
Born in c.954. In his youth, he was styled Prince of Cumbria. He succeeded his cousin Malcolm, son of King Duff, as King of Strathclyde in c.9 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Duncan I King of Scotland於1001年8月15日出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，他的父親Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl23歲，母親Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda18歲。他和Suthen至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他於1038年登記服兵役。他去世於1040年8月14日在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾享年38歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duncan I King of Scotland于1001年8月15日出生在苏格兰培爾阿爾时，他的父亲Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl23岁，母亲Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda18岁。他和Suthen至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他于1038年登记服兵役。他去世于1040年8月14日在苏格兰艾爾金爾享年38岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Duncan I King of Scotland was born on 15 August 1001, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, was 23 and his mother, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, was 18. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Suthen. He registered for military service in 1038. He died on 14 August 1040, in Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 38, and was buried in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Isle of Iona, Scotland: Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duncan I King of Scotland est né le 15 août 1001, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Suthen. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1038. Il est décédé le 14 août 1040, à Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Isle of Iona, Scotland: Isle of Iona, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Duncan I King of Scotland am 15. August 1001 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl 23 und seine Mutter Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda 18. Er hatte mit Suthen mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1038 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 14. August 1040 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Elginshire, Scotland und wurde in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan I King of Scotland è nato il il 15 agosto 1001 nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Suthen. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1038. Morì il 14 agosto 1040, nel Elginshire, Scotland, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Duncan I King of Scotlandが1001年8月15日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Athollは23歳，母Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináedaは18歳であった。彼はSuthenとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1038年に兵役登録をした。彼は1040年8月14日にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで38歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ アイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.Isle of Iona, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나
ko.lifeSummary: Duncan I King of Scotland(이)가 1001년 8월 15일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Suthen(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1038년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1040년 8월 14일 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.15 August 1001–14 August 1040: 15 de agosto de 1001–14 de agosto de 1040
pt.Isle of Iona, Scotland: Isle of Iona, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan I King of Scotland nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1001, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Suthen. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1038. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1040, em Elginshire, Scotland, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Isle of Iona, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ro.Isle of Iona, Scotland: Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.Isle of Iona, Scotland: исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duncan I King of Scotland родился 15 августа 1001 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, 18. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Suthen. В 1038 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 14 августа 1040 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duncan I King of Scotland nació el 15 de agosto de 1001, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Suthen. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1038. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1040, en Elginshire, Scotland, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Isle of Iona, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido.
